titleStmt.title: SII 7.271: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 271. ON THE TOP OF THE HILL AT GOOTY, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmat tribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyaṁ prava¨rddhamāna mācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu
sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁrājyaṁgeyyuttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷu sāvāsi vijṛṁbhacaṭṭanāyakanuṁ
va¨rmmacaṭṭanāyakanuṁ jēṣṭacaṭṭanāyakanuṁ śrīmadguttiya kōṭe rājādhyakṣada pāḷeyadiniralavaranumatyadiṁ
samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīramāhēsvaraṁ cōḷakaṭakakarituragapaṭu subhaṭanicayanija
baḷavadaribaḷatimirakhaṁḍana pratāpa mā¨rttaṁḍaṁ nikarakōdaṁḍaṁ draviḷamaṁḍaḷikaśiraḥkhaṁḍana maṁḍaḷikamukhamaṁḍana nadaṭa
yatārakāsurāri dasavadanamurāri mitramaṁḍaḷika kuḷā¨rṇnavacaṁdra gāmarēṁdra satyavikhyātaṁ maṁḍaḷikamāṁdhāta nāhavasīḻaṁ sēneya
patikōṭegharaṭṭagū¨rjjaradiśāpaṭṭaṁ śrīmattṟibhuvanamalladēvara kaṭṭida vara valeya nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmaccāḷu
mallarasaru taṁtrapāḷinelevīḍinalu siṁdavāḍi 1000 ramumanāḷuttaṁ sukhadinire . tatpāda padmōpajīvigaḷu samastaprasastisahitaṁ
śrī madguttiya kōṭeya daṁḍanāyaka kēsavarājanuṁ siṁgarasanuṁ basaṁtarasanuṁ muddarasanuṁ śrī maccāḷukya vikramakālada 31ne
ya sa¨rvvadhāri saṁvatsarada Āśvayuja ba 6 yādivāradaṁdu Āte geya viṣṇubhaṭṭa rige viṣṇudēva¨rge snāna nivēdya
dīpā¨rccāne pūjapunaskārakkaṁ dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi kōṭeya nairityadiśāvaradalū biṭṭe keyi
yareya mattaru 12 Iṁtī dha¨rmmavam tṛbhōgābhyaṁtara siddhiyāgi biṭṭaru ©
mattaṁ kōṭeya paścimadiśāvarada kaḷdavēṇigeya paḍuvalu biṭṭa kariya
keyi mattaru 700 gāṇa 1 tōṁṭa 1 © kalkuṭege mādaṁge biṭṭa mattaru 12 sammagāṟa
bōgōjaṁge mattaru 8 © dēvarakeyya kaṁmma baḍagaṇiṁ bare mūḍalu
haḷḷavē mēre Āgnēyadalu nairityadalu goṭṭa
haḍuvalu kaṭṭeya gōḍe vāyavyadalu
kaḷdavēṇege dīpa
Digital edition of SII 7.271 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
